text:
Author: glarkin
Date: Wed Sep 26 00:37:25 2012
New Revision: 304867
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304867

Log:
  - Updated to 0.20
  
  PR:		ports/170009 (based on)
  Submitted by:	Kimo <kimor79@yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-EC2/Makefile
  head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-EC2/distinfo

Modified: head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-EC2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-EC2/Makefile	Wed Sep 26 00:18:06 2012	(r304866)
+++ head/net/p5-Net-Amazon-EC2/Makefile	Wed Sep 26 00:37:25 2012	(r304867)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Net-Amazon-EC2
-PORTVERSION=	0.14
+PORTVERSION=	0.20
 CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -38,6 +38,7 @@ MAN3=		Net::Amazon::EC2.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::DescribeImagesResponse.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::DescribeInstanceAttributeResponse.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::DescribeKeyPairsResponse.3 \
+		Net::Amazon::EC2::DescribeTags.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::EbsBlockDevice.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::EbsInstanceBlockDeviceMapping.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::Error.3 \
@@ -65,13 +66,11 @@ MAN3=		Net::Amazon::EC2.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::Snapshot.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::SnapshotAttribute.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::StateReason.3 \
+		Net::Amazon::EC2::TagSet.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::UserData.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::UserIdGroupPair.3 \
 		Net::Amazon::EC2::Volume.3
 
-post-extract:
-	${RM} ${WRKSRC}/lib/Net/Amazon/._EC2.pm
-
 post-install:
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
